div1.entryFree: Ingredience, that which composes a compound: commends the i. of our poisoned chalice to our own lips, Mcb. I, 7, 11 (M. Edd. ingredients). add thereto a tiger's chaudron for the i. of our cauldron, IV, 1, 34 (M. Edd. ingredients). every inordinate cup is unblessed, and the i. is a devil, Oth. II, 3, 311 (Ff and M. Edd. ingredient).
